rationale: Fin. Code §351.003 governs secondary market transfers of property tax loans. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) affects appraisal valuation, not property tax lending transfer rules. No statutory intersection.
quote: Except as provided by Subsection (b), this chapter does not prohibit a property tax lender from receiving compensation from a party other than the property tax loan applicant for the sale, transfer, assignment, or release of rights on the closing of a property tax loan transaction.
_note: No conflict identified. §351.003 regulates property tax loan secondary market transactions; proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount operates in a distinct statutory domain with no operative overlap.
